capabilities: Utilize domain-specific criteria to enhance AI tool selection and prompting, ensuring alignment with specialized capabilities.

procedure.action: Extract domain-specific requirements by analyzing historical data and user feedback using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Map AI tool capabilities to domain requirements using a capability matrix using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Initialize AI prompts with domain-specific language and constraints by loading environment-specific values from config file; assert all required keys are present via config_validate(); assert config_validation_error_count < 1.

Run test prompts and compare outputs against domain-specific benchmarks using domain-appropriate tooling; assert error_count < 1 and result_valid = true; log operation_duration_ms and result_code to audit trail.

Run on prompt configurations based on output validation results up to max_iterations=10; halt when convergence_delta < 0.01 or no further improvement detected; log iteration_count and final_metric; assert final_metric > initial_metric.

summary: Optimize AI tool selection by applying capability matching with domain-specific constraints, ensuring effective AI prompting and output validation.
title: Specialized Capability Matching in AI Prompting

failureConditions: Inaccurate tool selection due to generic capability assessment.
Ineffective AI prompting leading to irrelevant outputs.

Misalignment between AI outputs and domain-specific needs; this occurs when the operation proceeds without pre-condition validation, allowing malformed input to propagate and corrupt downstream state silently.
metrics: all required keys are present via config_validate()
successConditions: Domain-specific benchmarks are met in 95% of test prompts; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
Capability matrix accurately reflects domain requirements; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
User feedback indicates improved relevance of AI outputs; assert error_rate < 0.001 and operation_completed = true.
